Description: Fires daily at 6 AM EST. Reads today's day number.
Reads content row: prompt, question, edit, captions.
Notes: Cache calendar in DynamoDB for speed

Description: Opens infrasketch.net, enters prompt, waits, screenshots.
Clicks node, asks question, screenshots response.
Sends edit request, waits for update, screenshots.
Clicks Create Design Doc, polls status, screenshots.
Sends doc edit via chat, screenshots updated doc.
Branded slide: Day X/365, title, category.
Closing slide: CTA text, logo, QR code.
Posts carousel with caption and hashtags.
Marks day as Posted, logs URLs.
Alerts on failure, marks as Failed.
